title: Trump-backed Truth Social pulls bids for crypto ETFs
summary: The crypto ETFs were intended to be part of Trump Media & Technology Group’s broader crypto strategy, which included the launch of the Truth.fi financial platform.

title: Wheat Drops on Lack of Chinese Confirmation of Grain Purchases
summary: US wheat futures led grains lower as sentiment soured due to a lack of confirmation from China on the Trump administration’s announcement of billions of dollars in agricultural purchases.

title: Indonesian Stocks Fall on Tightened Commodity Export Controls
summary: Indonesian stocks fell during choppy trading on Wednesday after President Prabowo Subianto’s plan to tighten oversight of commodity exports fueled concern about greater state control and weaker profitability in a key industry.
